case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JOSHUA ORUM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 10/31/07, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-30-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORUM, JOSHUA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ORUM, JOSHUA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-01-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-17-2008
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 HOURS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-19-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT INCLUDING ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS
